title: /l/ vs /r/
titleJa: L と R の違い
description: 日本人にとって最も難しい区別の一つ。/l/は舌が歯茎に触れ、/r/は舌がどこにも触れない。
keyDifference:
/l/: 舌先が上の歯茎にしっかりつく
/r/: 舌先はどこにもつかず、後ろに引く
practiceSentences: I really like the long road along the river.
The royal library is full of rare literature.
Larry rolled a large red ball down the lane.
Please remember to lock the door on the right.
The early bird already learned a lovely lullaby.

title: /θ/ vs /s/
titleJa: TH と S の違い
description: /θ/は舌を歯の間に出す。/s/は舌を歯につけない。日本人は/s/で代用しがち。
keyDifference:
/θ/: 舌先が上下の歯の間から見える
/s/: 舌先は歯の裏の近くにあるが触れない
practiceSentences: I think the path to success is something special.
Both Sam and Seth seem to be sick since Thursday.
The theme of the sixth song seems so smooth.
Thank you for the seven thick slices of something.
She thinks the south side is the safest place.

title: /æ/ vs /ʌ/
titleJa: 短母音 A と U の違い
description: どちらも日本語の「ア」に聞こえるが、口の開き方と舌の位置が異なる。
keyDifference:
/æ/: 口を横に大きく広げて「エ」寄りの「ア」
/ʌ/: 口をあまり開けずリラックスした「ア」
practiceSentences: The cat cut the cap and cup apart.
She ran to run a bath but had much trouble.
A black duck sat under the truck.
The man must catch the bus at half past one.
Can you come back with a snack for lunch?

title: /f/ vs /v/
titleJa: F と V の違い
description: 口の形は同じ（上歯+下唇）。/f/は息だけ、/v/は声帯を震わせる。
keyDifference:
/f/: 上歯を下唇に当てて息だけ出す（無声）
/v/: 同じ口の形で声を出す（有声）
practiceSentences: I have five favorite movies to view on Friday.
The van is a very fast vehicle and fun to drive.
Is it safe to leave the stove on overnight?
Vivian found a few flowers and fresh vines.
Give half the loaf of food to the visitors.

title: /b/ vs /v/
titleJa: B と V の違い
description: 日本語では両方「バ行」になりがち。/b/は両唇、/v/は歯+唇。
keyDifference:
/b/: 両唇を閉じて破裂させる
/v/: 上歯を下唇に当てて振動させる（唇は閉じない）
practiceSentences: The best vest belongs to the brave volunteer.
Bob's van is very big and beautiful.
Buy a berry and a vase at the village bazaar.
Every boy voted for the brave basketball team.
The baby loved the very bright blue bird.
